_schema: One JSON line appended per session, at session end. Fields: ts (ISO local, Pacific), type (reconcile|quick|coaching|sunday|tutor|apply|debrief|system), reconciled (bool, did a reality-scan run), found_drift (bool, did the scan change anything), read (list of files consulted beyond memory.md), actions (short list of what was done), tripwires_opened (optional: short stable slugs for tripwires opened this session), tripwires_closed (optional: the same slugs when they close), notes (one line). Tripwire latency = days between a slug appearing in tripwires_opened and in tripwires_closed; that is the system core KPI. Consumed by the monthly system health check in /sunday. Keep every line one line. Each January, roll the past year to session-log-<year>.jsonl and start this file fresh with this schema line.
